data.reasoning: Both audits skipped PKGBUILD due to erroneous binary file detection, preventing assessment of build/install logic. Critical security risks cannot be evaluated without this file.
coverage_issues: PKGBUILD skipped by both models due to false binary detection
No review of install hooks, build scripts, or source code referenced by PKGBUILD
false_negatives: All execution risks (network access, filesystem operations during makepkg) missed due to PKGBUILD skip
Potential malicious code in build()/package() functions unassessed
re_audit_focus: Source files referenced in build/package functions
learnings: Fix binary detection: PKGBUILD must always be processed as text
Prioritize critical files: Fail audits if PKGBUILD isn't reviewed
Improve error handling: Trigger manual review when critical files are skipped
Add file type heuristics: Treat PKGBUILD/.install as text regardless of initial detection
